scope: TG2 candidate-topology grammar over the 5 still-human topology DOF (TG0 bench/qk-g3-provenance-audit) for packed-quant decode GEMV. The candidate author (extra/qk_topology_candidate_author.py) enumerates a BOUNDED set of TopologySpecs (TG1 IR, extra/qk_lanemap_template.py) from {profile facts x this grammar x refuted-axis exclusions}. NO route_id, NO hardcoded (block_groups,words_per_group), NO hardcoded axis-roles.
audit_only: AUDIT/RESEARCH. No GPU kernel, no default change, no live-route repoint. Enumerates + spec-matches only.

lane_ownership_axis.note: how the wave's lanes map onto a packed-quant GEMV. packed_word = lanes co-own one output row's coalesced packed quant-words and reduce across lanes (the family the (block_groups x words_per_group) factorization sub-grammar applies to). output_row = lanes own distinct output rows, each reduces K serially (no cross-lane). block_group = one K block-group per lane. token = decode-time token parallelism. split = hybrid ownership.

lane_grouping.note: how many output rows share a wave (sets per_row_lanes = lane_extent // rows_per_wave, which is the product the factorization must equal). subgroup==wave on wave32 (folds into 1row_per_warp). half_warp is REFUTED (see refuted_axis_exclusions.coop_halfwarp_direct).

load_pattern.note: coalesced_packed_word = unit-stride uint32 packed-word load (the only quant-coalescing-valid load for Q4_K, decode_ffn_gemv_gfx1100_v1). strided/scalar are REFUTED (see exclusions).

dequant_placement.note: where Q4_K nibbles are unpacked. per_lane_in_register = each lane dequants the words it owns (no reuse needed for single-token GEMV). shared_predecode/split require inter-row weight reuse, which does not exist at decode M=1 (shape-pruned).

reduction.note: how per-lane partials become out[row]. ds_bpermute_tree -> cross_lane_wave_reduce (TG1 IR). lds_partial_reduce -> partials_plus_reduce (TG1 IR). lane_partition_reduce_sum applies only to output_row ownership (each lane fully reduces its own row -> direct_out, no cross-lane combine).

output.note: coupled to reduction: cross_lane/lane_partition -> direct_out; lds_partial -> partials_plus_sum.

target_features.note: target-feature gate. The profile (gfx1100) provides wave32 -> lane_extent=32. wave64/subgroup_simdgroup are other-target and pruned (target-mismatch); vector_dot (v_dot2) is an orthogonal lowering capability, not a topology DOF here.

factorization_sub_grammar.rule: enumerate ALL integer (block_groups, words_per_group) with block_groups*words_per_group == per_row_lanes (= lane_extent // rows_per_wave). per_row_lanes derives from target.lane_extent and lane_grouping; the factor pairs are computed by divisor enumeration, NOT hardcoded.
factorization_sub_grammar.quant_validity_prune: words_per_group must divide quant_words_per_block (Q4_K: 36-4=32 quant uint32 words); group_pairs = quant_words_per_block // words_per_group must be a positive integer.
factorization_sub_grammar.shape_validity_prune: block_groups must divide k_blocks (= K // qk_k) for every eligible role (gate_up/qo k_blocks=16, down k_blocks=48). block_groups | gcd(16,48)=16, so block_groups in {1,2,4,8,16}; (32,1) is pruned.

axis_role_derivation.rule: DERIVED from lane_ownership_axis, NOT hardcoded. For packed_word: the output axis (row=N) -> GLOBAL; the factors appearing in the lane index (lane = block_group*words_per_group + word_col, i.e. {block_group, word_col}) -> LOCAL; the remaining K-iteration factors ({local_block, group_pair}) -> REDUCE. Same rule for every factor pair in the family.
axis_role_derivation.lane_ownership_index: DERIVED as the coalesced packed-word index of the packed_word ownership axis: (row*k_blocks + (block_group*blocks_per_group + local_block))*q4k_words_per_block + q4k_quant_word_base + group_pair*words_per_group + word_col. This symbolic formula is assigned to EVERY packed_word candidate (it is a property of the ownership axis, not of the (4,8) point).

refuted_axis_exclusions.disposition: deprioritized: G3 matches owned, no layout gap to recover
small/no movement (attention-only, N/A to decode GEMV)
refuted: no W==D movement (attention-only, N/A to decode GEMV)
